name: dev-kit
description: Disciplined local development workflows for planning, execution, debugging, optimization, and cleanup.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined planning, execution, debugging, and cleanup workflows.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex plugin bundling reusable development skills for clarification, plan execution, milestone orchestration, debugging, optimization, and AI-code cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this request and turn it into an execution-ready plan.
Run this implementation plan and validate each task independently.
Debug this failing test using a reproduce-first workflow.
